command:
echo "=== FIX SOCAT: forward 8788 → 9119 instead of 8787 ==="
ssh -i /home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=10 jose@192.168.0.199 '
echo "--- current service ---"
cat /etc/systemd/system/remy-webhook-forwarder.service

echo "--- update service ---"
sudo sed -i "s|TCP:127.0.0.1:8787|TCP:127.0.0.1:9119|g" /etc/systemd/system/remy-webhook-forwarder.service
sudo systemctl daemon-reload
sudo systemctl restart remy-webhook-forwarder.service
sleep 2

echo "--- verify ---"
cat /etc/systemd/system/remy-webhook-forwarder.service | grep ExecStart
ss -tlnp | grep -E "8788|9119"
systemctl is-active remy-webhook-forwarder.service

echo "--- test 8788 locally ---"
curl -s --max-time 5 -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" http://localhost:8788/telegram-webhook || echo "FAILED"
' 2>&1

echo "=== WAIT FOR CF PROPAGATION ==="
sleep 5

echo "=== TEST PUBLIC WEBHOOK ==="
curl -s --max-time 10 -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" https://remy.cutegrafiks.com/telegram-webhook 2>/dev/null || echo "FAILED"

echo "=== CHECK TELEGRAM WEBHOOK STATUS ==="
python3 -c "
import json, urllib.request
tok = '8363191602:AAGVXfJKqNGNhyS-EuxEl8CKRcUyjqIGtPE'
r = urllib.request.urlopen(f'https://api.telegram.org/bot{tok}/getWebhookInfo', timeout=10)
d = json.loads(r.read())
wh = d.get('result', {})
print('url:', wh.get('url','NONE'))
print('pending_updates:', wh.get('pending_update_count', 0))
print('last_error:', wh.get('last_error_message', 'none'))
print('last_error_date:', wh.get('last_error_date', 0))
"
